CE1.justification: Agent captured the pattern and gave a single yes/no clarifying option at the end — no doc-reading or context reconstruction asked of the user.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact, but slides into prescription ('worth raising with IT ops... in parallel adding a checklist step') that goes beyond the flag the user asked for.

CE3.justification: Named the file ('logged ... as contractor-access-lag.md so it doesn't get lost') — destination plus a one-clause purpose ('so it doesn't get lost'), but not why that filename vs. an observations/decisions split.

CE4.justification: Single file written cleanly; nothing partial would be left mid-flow.
